name: save-to-memex
description: Firefox extension to save articles to Memex

scripts.copy: cp src/popup/popup.html src/popup/popup.css popup/ && cp src/options/options.html src/options/options.css options/
scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run copy
scripts.package: npm run build && web-ext build --ignore-files 'src/**' 'tests/**' 'node_modules/**' '*.ts' '*.mjs' --artifacts-dir dist
scripts.test:all: vitest run --config vitest.config.ts && npx playwright test
